name: diff-filter
description: Show only added and removed lines from git diff, or show --stat/--name-only summaries, with optional --head limit.

parameters.name: file
parameters.description: Optional file path to filter diff for

parameters.name: options
parameters.description: --cached for staged, --added-only or --removed-only to filter, --stat for file summary, --name-only for filenames, --head N to limit output lines

cost_saving_rationale: Replaces a full git diff or git diff --stat piped through head with a compact view, reducing observation size and saving one or more agent steps.
